label: Page-Header
content: 導言 實踐永續管理

label: Section-Header
content: 台積公司廢棄物廠商管理發展時程

label: Figure
content:
Timeline of Waste Management Vendor Management Development (104 to 119):

  • 104: Establish new waste treatment vendor selection process, publish annual performance standards, establish dedicated GPS tracking team, execute annual vendor performance evaluation.
  • 105: Strengthen annual vendor performance evaluation.
  • 106: Establish centralized reporting process for waste treatment vendors.
  • 107: Increase internal monitoring equipment utilization rate of vendors.
  • 108: Establish centralized reporting process for waste treatment vendors.
  • 109: Organize vendor waste management business consultation, complete automatic reporting platform integration with environmental monitoring, strengthen GPS tracking team, initiate vendor smart waste management plan, establish product flow reporting platform for reuse.
  • 110: Waste treatment vendor annual evaluation revised, establish waste operation optimization specialists, build smart waste tracking platform (S.W.I.F.T.), promote environmental monitoring reporting for product flow.
  • 111: Complete vendor ISO 14001 certification and S.W.I.F.T. setup (100%).
  • 119: Achieve 100% vendor ISO 14001 certification and S.W.I.F.T. setup.

Legend: Waste treatment vendor management, Waste treatment, Processing/reuse based on situation control, Reuse product delivery, Reuse product flow.
